acceptance_criteria: scripts/generate-specs.py extracts @spec annotations; --check fails when SPECS.md is stale; initial FLOW-* annotations appear in generated SPECS.md; focused tests cover generator behavior
description: Add grep-able FLOW-* @spec annotations, a generated SPECS.md, and a generator/check script so flowchart compatibility requirements are traceable from tests.
title: Pilot FLOW spec annotations and generated SPECS
